response.justification: Szabo meets the experience and seniority bar with 19+ years and multiple Staff-level roles, plus strong cloud and infrastructure credentials. However, the AI specialization is a significant gap—his AI infrastructure work at re:cinq began only 6 months ago, and the resume lacks demonstrated AI products, platforms, or formal ML expertise that the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires. He has the foundational seniority and technical breadth to grow into the position, but currently fits 'senior cloud engineer' better than 'AI strategy principal.'
strengths: Exceeds 15+ year requirement with ~20 years of progressive IC seniority, including multiple Staff-level roles (Altom, re:cinq) demonstrating director-level leadership
Strong full-stack technical foundation spanning infrastructure, cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), embedded systems, and entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective founder, 2016–present)
Currently engaged in AI infrastructure and agent development at re:cinq, showing active positioning in emerging AI platform technologies and MCP frameworks
concerns: AI/ML expertise is underdemonstrated; AI infrastructure work began April 2025 with no prior ML-focused roles, inconsistent with 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'
Missing preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field; formal ML credentials would strengthen credibility for strategy-level AI role
No evidence of building or shipping AI products; resume focuses on general cloud and infrastructure work rather than AI-specific innovation or platform development
